text:
/ci1 1 邪魔者が並んで出てきてしまったぞ？
こちらではないと指示したのに
存外に頑固だね、君達は。

/ci1 1 You see? You've just made life harder for
yourself. I tried to tell you not to go this
way. How very stubborn you people are.

邪魔者が並んで出てきてしまったぞ？
こちらではないと指示したのに
存外に頑固だね、君達は。

You see? You've just made life harder for
yourself. I tried to tell you not to go this
way. How very stubborn you people are.
